---
title: "Delta Soil Core and Carbon"
author: "Brooke Eastman"
format: html
---

## Setup

### Packages

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
```

### read in data
#### read in Coastal Carbon Network data

```{r}
# read in sites data
delta_ccn_cores <- read_csv(here('data','CCN_cores.csv'))

# get a list of study_ids that show what publications are included
CCN_studies <- as.data.frame(unique(delta_ccn_cores$study_id))
```
